result:
No errors found (grep exit 1 = no matches). The build is fully green.

Fixed all five compile errors:
1. `src/utils/eloop.c:615` — `timeout->time.seconds` → `.sec` (struct field typo)
2. `wpa_supplicant/config_file.c:29` — `os_strlength` → `os_strlen` (wrong function name)
3. `src/rsn_supp/wpa.c:103` — `sm->pairwise_ciph` → `pairwise_cipher` (struct field typo)
4. `wpa_supplicant/events.c:132` — `wpa_s->cur_ssid` → `current_ssid` (struct field typo)
5. `wpa_supplicant/scan.c:1137` — `eloop_register_timeout(...)` was missing its 5th `user_data` argument; added `NULL` to match the function's signature and other call sites
